message:
test(tui): add model selector overlay + cycling edge case tests

Add 12 PiApp integration tests for model selector overlay (open, cancel,
filter, navigate, select, backspace) and cycling edge cases (single model,
scoped single model, wrap-forward). Also includes 9 snapshot tests for
header/thinking/tool toggles from concurrent agent, E2E reload assertions,
and minor formatting cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
